checks.description: Detect Hibernate ORM usage from Maven, Gradle, XML mappings, or source imports.
Find legacy org.hibernate.Criteria usage that requires migration review for Hibernate 6.
Find direct org.hibernate.Session usage that should be validated across ORM upgrades.
Find custom UserType or BasicType integration points that often require Hibernate 6 migration work.
Find Hibernate XML mapping files that need explicit upgrade validation.
Find javax persistence or validation usage that overlaps with modern Hibernate and Jakarta migration work.
Capture Maven or Gradle compile and test validation after upgrade preparation.
Summarize compile, test, rollback, compatibility, and confidence evidence for Professional packaging.
